leadText: The Radiant Petal (Japanese: かがやくはなびら Shining Petal) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Radiant Petal is used along with a tuft of White Mane Hair or Black Mane Hair to create the Reins of Unity .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A single petal that the King of Bountiful Harvests gave you. It radiates faint light.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Radiant Petal is used along with a tuft of White Mane Hair or Black Mane Hair to create the Reins of Unity . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A single petal that the King of Bountiful Harvests gave you. It radiates faint light. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh CT Freezington (obtained from Calyrex after defeating Glastrier or Spectrier )
